milestones.label: Arnold sighting
milestones.blurb: Kenneth Arnold's report of nine objects near Mt Rainier — origin of 'flying saucer'.

milestones.label: Roswell
milestones.blurb: RAAF announces recovery of a 'flying disc' near Roswell, NM, then retracts within a day.

milestones.label: Robertson Panel
milestones.blurb: CIA convenes panel to assess UAP after the 1952 D.C. flap; recommends public debunking.

milestones.label: Blue Book closed
milestones.blurb: USAF terminates Project Blue Book after the Condon Report.

milestones.label: Close Encounters
milestones.blurb: Spielberg's film cements the modern UAP imagination in mainstream culture.

milestones.label: Belgian wave
milestones.blurb: Months of triangular UFO sightings over Belgium with corroborating F-16 radar tracks.

milestones.label: X-Files premiere
milestones.blurb: The Truth Is Out There — UAP enters prestige TV.

milestones.label: Phoenix Lights
milestones.blurb: Mass sighting of a V-shaped formation over Arizona witnessed by thousands.

milestones.label: Tic Tac
milestones.blurb: USS Nimitz F/A-18 crews encounter a Tic-Tac shaped object off Baja California.

milestones.label: AATIP stood up
milestones.blurb: Advanced Aerospace Threat Identification Program quietly funded inside the DoD.

milestones.label: NYT reveals AATIP
milestones.blurb: NYT publishes the AATIP article, surfacing the Tic Tac and Gimbal videos to the public.

milestones.label: UAP Task Force
milestones.blurb: DoD formalizes the UAP Task Force after years of internal pressure.

milestones.label: 60 Minutes UAP
milestones.blurb: Mainstream prime-time coverage featuring Navy aviators and former AATIP staff.

milestones.label: ODNI preliminary report
milestones.blurb: First unclassified ODNI assessment of UAP incidents reported by U.S. military aviators.

milestones.label: AARO stood up
milestones.blurb: All-domain Anomaly Resolution Office consolidates UAP work across the DoD/IC.

milestones.label: Grusch testimony
milestones.blurb: House Oversight subcommittee hearing with David Grusch, Ryan Graves, David Fravor.

milestones.label: Schumer UAP Disclosure Act
milestones.blurb: Senate amendment proposing a sweeping UAP records review board, modelled on the JFK Records Act.

milestones.label: Burchett-Luna hearing
milestones.blurb: House subcommittee hearing focused on alleged classified UAP retrieval programs.

milestones.label: PURSUE launch
milestones.blurb: war.gov publishes its consolidated UAP records release portal.
